sections.heading: LMTD Calculator – Log Mean Temperature Difference Calculator
sections.content: Free LMTD calculator for heat exchangers. Calculate log mean temperature difference, correction factors, and thermal performance. Supports counterflow, parallel flow, shell-and-tube, and cross-flow configurations.

sections.heading: How to Use This Calculator
sections.content: Enter your values in the calculator above and click calculate to see instant results. Adjust inputs to compare scenarios and find the option that fits your needs.

faq.question: What does the LMTD Calculator – Log Mean Temperature Difference Calculator do?
faq.answer: Free LMTD calculator for heat exchangers. Calculate log mean temperature difference, correction factors, and thermal performance. Supports counterflow, parallel flow, shell-and-tube, and cross-flow configurations.

faq.question: Is this calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes. Smart Calculator tools are free, work in your browser, and require no signup.
